entries.title: Copy Fail: What You Need to Know About the Most Severe Linux Threat in Years
entries.summary: Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) is a critical Linux kernel LPE that allows stealthy root access. This flaw impacts millions of systems. Read our analysis. The post Copy Fail: What You Need to Know About the Most Severe Linux Threat in Years appeared first on Unit 42 .
